prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约10088名→10031名→9627名→15173名→25759名。2021–2023年位次稳定在9600–10100区间，2024年因新高考改革（本科批合并 、专业组模式）位次后移至15173名，2025年进一步大幅后移至25759名，近两年累计后移约16000名，主要受专业组细分（含师范类低分专业组）及考生报考策略变化影响；该校在江西省物理类招生计划：2021年98人、2022年98人、2023年100人、2024年105人、2025年111人、2026年120人。2026年较2025年扩招9人（+8.1%） ，连续三年扩招，计划增加使竞争压力有所缓解，但扩招幅度小于位次后移幅度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学是211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：202 1年第65名→2022年第59名→2023年第60名→2024年第55名→2025年第51名→2026年第52名，稳居全国前55名区间，属于中上水平211高校，在食品科学与工程、轻工技术与工程领域具 有全国顶尖实力；2023年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学校管理事件），但影响有限；抖音热度排名第71位（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光度中等，未出现明显高 热或负面舆情爆发；近年无投档线断档记录，报考心理整体平稳；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A+（均为全国顶尖），与该校招生的食品科学与工程、食 品营养与健康、生物工程、纺织工程等专业直接对应，王牌学科对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热门专业该 校均有开设且位次靠前；食品科学与工程所属的生化环材大类社会热度为明显劝退，可能对相关专业报考热度产生一定抑制；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人（较2025年 约472480人微增），物理类考生估算约267800人（较2025年266425人微增约1400人），竞争略有加剧物理类本科批从2024年448分降至2025年429分，降幅明显，反 映试卷难度或考生整体水平变化；江南大学位于江苏无锡（长三角核心区），对江西省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在江 西省招生占比约2.5%–3%，非本地高校，跨省报考的地域偏好因素持续存在。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅后移至25759名、2026年扩招8.1%使竞争略有缓解、但江西省 物理类考生微增。预测2026年物理类最低位次约27062名，区间26562–2756 2名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10088 → 10031 → 9627 → 15173 → 25759. Rankings were stable in the 9600–10100 range from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (merging of undergraduate batches and major group model), the ranking shifted to 15173. In 2025, it further significantly shifted to 25759, with a cumulative shift of about 16000 positions over the past two years, mainly affected by the subdivision of major groups (including low-scoring major groups in teacher training) and changes in candidates' application strategies. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province: 98 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 100 in 2023, 105 in 2024, 111 in 2025, and 120 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan expands by 9 students (+8.1%), with three consecutive years of expansion, easing competitive pressure, but the expansion magnitude is smaller than the ranking shift magnitude.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 65th in 2021 → 59th in 2022 → 60th in 2023 → 55th in 2024 → 51st in 2025 → 52nd in 2026, consistently in the top 55 range nationwide, belonging to mid-to-upper level 211 universities. It has top national strength in Food Science and Engineering and Light Industry Technology and Engineering. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative (involving school management incidents), but the impact was limited. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (evaluated as average), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, without obvious high heat or negative public opinion outbreaks. In recent years, there have been no records of admission cutoff line drops, and the overall application psychology is stable. Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) and Food Science and Engineering (A+) are both top nationally, directly corresponding to the university's enrolled majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Bioengineering, and Textile Engineering. The flagship disciplines have strong appeal to candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university offers popular social majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, with high rankings. Food Science and Engineering, belonging to the broader category of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials, has a clear social discouragement effect, which may suppress the application enthusiasm for related majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900 (slightly up from about 472,480 in 2025), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 267,800 (slightly up from 266,425 in 2025 by about 1,400), slightly intensifying competition. The Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff dropped from 448 points in 2024 to 429 points in 2025, a significant decrease, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or overall candidate level. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu (core area of the Yangtze River Delta), which has strong geographical appeal to Jiangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 2.5%–3%, not a local university, and the cross-province application geographical preference factor persists.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking shift to 25759 in 2025, the 8.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, but the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 27062, with a range of 26562–27562.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 26562 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Clinical Medicine Excellence Class, Computer Science); candidates with rankings around 27000 should mainly target Tier 2 advantageous majors (Food Science and Engineering A+, Electronic Information), while also considering Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 27562 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings (such as Big Data Management and Application, Information and Computing Science).

The fluctuation range over the past five years is about 180 positions, indicating relatively high ranking stability. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 1 student (+5.9%), a slight expansion with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 52nd, firmly within the top 55 nationally, placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 universities. Its 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving a school management incident), but the impact was limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 71st (rated as average), with no high-heat public opinion. There have been no records of admission cutoff line drops in recent years. It has A+ in Light Industry Technology and Engineering and A+ in Food Science and Engineering, but the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Accounting, Social Work, Ideological and Political Education) have low correlation with its advantageous disciplines, limiting the appeal of its strong subjects to History Category students.

专业热度与地域.text: Law has a recommended social popularity (relatively hot), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended, Accounting is recommended, and Ideological and Political Education has stable popularity.
